scores.correctness_notes: Covers all three notice types, identity/deduplication, persistence, pebble_custom_notice event observation, and CLI usage. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: container.get_pebble_client().notify() method is not a standard ops API — ops uses container.get_notices() but notify() from charm side is questionable. The Notice dataclass fields and LazyNotice reference may be fabricated or inaccurate. The event hierarchy section and hook name '<container>-pebble-notice-custom' are unverified additions not in the gold standard.
